title: thelypteris clypeolutata
intro: Thelypteris clypeolutata, also known as the leathery shield fern, is a species of fern belonging to the family Thelypteridaceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Thelypteris clypeolutata include its ability to treat skin conditions such as eczema and acne, as well as its potential to reduce fever and alleviate respiratory issues. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, with its leaves and rhizomes being the primary parts used for medicinal purposes.
